mapper.select:
SELECT cust_cd, cust_nm, cust_type, tel, addr FROM tb_customer
AND (cust_cd LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cust_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND cust_type = #{cust_type}
ORDER BY cust_cd

SELECT item_cd, item_nm, item_grp, spec, unit_cd, unit_price FROM tb_item
AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND (item_cd LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR item_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND item_grp = #{item_grp}
ORDER BY item_cd
